Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation in the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait - User to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + Resolved in variants where Completed + In Call does not occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait - User and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait - User in variants that end with Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Total waiting time to Accepted + Wait - User after Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Wait - User to be followed by Completed + In Call versus Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum duration of Accepted + Wait - User in high-impact cases (impact = 'High')
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Average time from the start of the case to Accepted + Wait - User in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait - User when preceded by Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average elapsed time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + In Call in USA-based cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that loop back to Accepted + In Progress before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User compared to Accepted + Wait - Vendor within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total time between Accepted + Wait - User and the final Completed + Closed activity in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User in Brazil versus France
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - User to the next non-waiting activity (e.g., Accepted + In Progress or Completed + In Call)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'
